title: Vacancy for Category Manager at BigBasket Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Category Manager at BigBasket Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at BigBasket Consulting Pvt Ltd. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Category Manager to strengthen our Jaipur-based team.

About BigBasket Consulting Pvt Ltd:
BigBasket Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Product Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BigBasket Consulting Pvt Ltd!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
